Name: Daily NJ News Digest
Description:
Want to know what's happening in New Jersey? You've come to the right place. The NJ News Commons daily newsletter is a statewide, no-frills roundup of the most pressing and important issues facing New Jersey residents. It's filled every weekday with links to trusted news sources in the Garden State.

A quick read and you'll be up-to-date on what's happening in our state. 

Our daily newsletter also features info about the latest trainings, resources, and events from the Center for Cooperative Media and our partners in the NJ News Commons network. And we offer a daily selection of "must-reads" from journalism and media support organizations, non-profits, tech blogs, and more to help you stay up on the latest industry tactics and trends.

Name: Daily NJ Politics from ObserverNJ
Description: A daily email featuring the most important scoops and political news from around the Garden State.

Name: Jersey Shore Online Newsletter

Name: Lavellette-Seaside Shorebeat Morning News
Description: It’s easy to keep up with what’s happening in Lavallette, Ortley Beach, Seaside Heights and Seaside Park! Sign up to get our morning newsletter to have the latest news on the island delivered to your inbox every morning.

Name: New Jersey Stage Daily Edition
Description: New Jersey Stage publishes between 50-75 news articles and original features each week. Our newsletter is the best way to keep up with all of the arts & entertainment news on the website. It is available in daily or weekly form. Subscriptions are free, customized, and may be canceled at any time. Nobody covers the arts throughout the Garden State like New Jersey Stage!

Name: New Jersey Stage Magazine
Description: A free, monthly digital magazine covering the arts throughout the Garden State.  It is designed like a traditional publication with pages that turn, but the pages come alive with audio, video, and interactivity! The magazine is readable on any PC, tablet, or even a smartphone.

Name: News12 New Jersey Daily News Brief
Description: Daily newsletter published by News 12 New Jersey for people who register on the website and sign up for newsletter.

Name: NJ Bike & Walk Coalition Newsletter
Description: The NJBWC is a non-profit 501(c)(3) public charity working to make safe roads for bike riders and pedestrians a priority in New Jersey. Receive updates on our work, including projects, funding, and policy, and participate in Action Alerts to help us move forward our agenda of safety and access for everyone. We also host the NJ Bike & Walk Summit each year; sign up for updates.

Name: NJ Cannabis Media Weekly

Name: NJ Policy Perspective
Description: New Jersey Policy Perspective drives policy change to advance economic justice and prosperity for all New Jerseyans through evidence-based, independent research, analysis and advocacy.  We are a “think-and-do tank”: once our analysis is done, our communications and outreach teams gets it into the hands of policymakers, advocates, and partners. Our team works to shape NJ state policy in both proactive and reactive ways: research/analysis, strategic communications, and close collaboration with partners.

Name: The Local Connection
Description:
Each week, we bring you national and regional news stories with a potential local connection or angle. Use this newsletter as your go-to resource for finding new and interesting stories that will resonate with your audience and your community. 

Want to collaborate on a story?
Let us know! Reply to this email or drop Carla Baranauckas a line at baranauckasc@montclair.edu. You can also connect with us via the NJ News Commons listserv at nj-news-commons@googlegroups.com.
